'''âf-l-p-sh''' ('''kafalpeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exonerate|exonerate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exonerate|exonerate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-l-p-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafalpeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifalpeshoko|thifalpeshoko]] || [[word:jifalpeshoko|jifalpeshoko]] || [[word:shifalpeshoko|shifalpeshoko]] || [[word:kifalpeshoko|kifalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufalpeshoko|thuthufalpeshoko]] || [[word:jujufalpeshoko|jujufalpeshoko]] || [[word:shushufalpeshoko|shushufalpeshoko]] || [[word:kukufalpeshoko|kukufalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufalpeshoko|thufalpeshoko]] || [[word:jufalpeshoko|jufalpeshoko]] || [[word:shufalpeshoko|shufalpeshoko]] || [[word:kufalpeshoko|kufalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufalpeshoko|thufalpeshoko]] || [[word:jufalpeshoko|jufalpeshoko]] || [[word:shufalpeshoko|shufalpeshoko]] || [[word:kufalpeshoko|kufalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefalpeshoko|thefalpeshoko]] || [[word:jefalpeshoko|jefalpeshoko]] || [[word:shefalpeshoko|shefalpeshoko]] || [[word:kefalpeshoko|kefalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofalpeshoko|thothofalpeshoko]] || [[word:jojofalpeshoko|jojofalpeshoko]] || [[word:shoshofalpeshoko|shoshofalpeshoko]] || [[word:kokofalpeshoko|kokofalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofalpeshoko|thofalpeshoko]] || [[word:jofalpeshoko|jofalpeshoko]] || [[word:shofalpeshoko|shofalpeshoko]] || [[word:kofalpeshoko|kofalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofalpeshoko|thofalpeshoko]] || [[word:jofalpeshoko|jofalpeshoko]] || [[word:shofalpeshoko|shofalpeshoko]] || [[word:kofalpeshoko|kofalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfalpeshoko|thĂŠfalpeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfalpeshoko|jĂŠfalpeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfalpeshoko|shĂŠfalpeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfalpeshoko|kĂŠfalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafalpeshoko|thathafalpeshoko]] || [[word:jajafalpeshoko|jajafalpeshoko]] || [[word:shashafalpeshoko|shashafalpeshoko]] || [[word:kakafalpeshoko|kakafalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafalpeshoko|thafalpeshoko]] || [[word:jafalpeshoko|jafalpeshoko]] || [[word:shafalpeshoko|shafalpeshoko]] || [[word:kafalpeshoko|kafalpeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafalpeshoko|thafalpeshoko]] || [[word:jafalpeshoko|jafalpeshoko]] || [[word:shafalpeshoko|shafalpeshoko]] || [[word:kafalpeshoko|kafalpeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafalpeshithi|shafalpeshithi]] || [[word:shafalpeshiji|shafalpeshiji]] || [[word:shafalpeshishi|shafalpeshishi]] || [[word:shafalpeshiki|shafalpeshiki]]
